title: My Melancholy Baby
overview: "My Melancholy Baby" takes a look at 48 hours into the difficult life of the Burrows family. This story is told through the eyes of the older son, Miles Burrows, a 19 year old drug addict who hasn't been home because his home life is the underlying reason for his addiction.
